features: Air Wick Freshmatic Autospray automatically releases bursts of continuous fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours. One spritz is enough to fill a room, and make your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy the great smell. Fragrances your home for up to 70 days per refill when on low setting.
description: Product Description Air Wick Freshmatic Autospray automatically releases bursts of continuous fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours. One spritz is enough to fill a room, and make your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy the great smell. Fragrances your home for up to 70 days per refill when on low setting.
